global.description: The ad features a light gray background with geometric shapes and prominent text.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A soft light gray background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a subtle outline style.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangular shape with a faint outline, positioned centrally in the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the bottom center of the ad, outlined but not filled.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind' centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' displayed in a bold font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button with white text saying 'Shop now' located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with geometric elements, SwiftStack logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, SwiftStack, Shop now
